title: UPSC CDS II Online Form 2026 for 451 Post
short_information: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has released Combined Defence Services Exam Second Examination 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are Interested in this UPSC CDS II Vacancy 2026 can Apply Online from 20/05/2026 to 09/06/2026. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information. Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) UPSC Combined Defence Service Exam II Recruitment 2026 UPSC CDS II Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS : 200/- SC / ST / Female : 0/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking or Pay the Exam Fee Through E Challan UPSC CDS II Eligibility 2026 For IMA & OTA : Bachelor Degree in Any Stream. For Naval Academy : Bachelor Degree in Engineering . For Airforce : Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with Physics & Math in 10+2 Level CDS 2
